Skill supply-chain security: provenance tracking + permission manifests

Security: Indirect prompt injection via URL link preview metadata
SSH transport security check rejects connection before tunnel is established
security audit: two false positives for single-operator multi-agent setups

Security: unpaired message response leaks platform identity

[Bug]: Security audit doesn't check top-level channels.discord.allowFrom for slash commands
[Security] Browser screenshot tool auto-delivers sensitive on-screen data to chat channels
[Security] web-fetch-visibility: near-invisible CSS patterns not covered by sanitizer
Security by Intent: Progressive Permission Pattern Generalization to Eliminate Privilege Escalation and Approval Fatigue
Security: Unauthorized OAuth credential extraction from Gemini CLI installation
Security: strengthen external content handling with persistent tainting, content-derived execution guardrails, and exec risk classes
Proposal: Add security warning for untrusted skills loaded from local sources
Proposal: Enhance security audit to include `skill.md` for better risk detection
[Feature]: Security: fetch-auth bearer token fallback attaches tokens to arbitrary URLs without fail-closed defaults
[Bug]: Security prompt is too long to approve, and clicking "Allow All" on the security prompt is ineffective

[Feature]: Tool security classification properties (isDestructive, isReadOnly, isConcurrencySafe)
[Bug]: tools.exec.security corrupted by plugin init logs — hot-reload concatenates plugin output into config value
[Security] High: MCP loopback scope spoofing via mutable request headers
[Feature][Security]: Add optional TOTP (authenticator app code) to exec approvals
[Bug]: Security Issue: Agent Privacy Isolation Bypass via Direct File Read
[Feature] Add denylist mode to exec.security for balanced security
Security: exec tool returns raw stdout/stderr to agent without secret redaction
[Feature]: Standard Interface for External Security and Guardrail Checks
Explore per-agent worker isolation, VFS scratch storage, and host filesystem capabilities
[Feature]: Local user sandbox backend for per-agent Unix account isolation

fix(heartbeat-filter): preserve HEARTBEAT_OK detection with reasoning/thinking blocks

fix: ignore reasoning-only heartbeat ack blocks
fix: treat feishu bind conversation ids as peers

fix(commitments): single-char ellipsis so truncated table cells hold padEnd width
fix(media-understanding): append actionable install hint when a media provider is missing (#95658)
[AI] fix(memory-lancedb): expose memory ID in recall and add text-fal…

fix(install): pin node-domexception to resolvable 2.0.2

Doctor: expose state integrity findings

fix(skills): accept owner-qualified verify refs
test(providers): align JSON fixtures with bounded readers

fix: keep yielded parent runs deferred until subagents settle
fix(session-lock): allow reentrant acquire from inner transcript writers
fix: use single-char ellipsis in commitments truncate() to prevent table misalignment

fix(tavily): bound untrusted JSON response reads
fix(ollama): bound model-discovery JSON response reads

fix(acpx): detect wrapper orphan on any PPID change, not just init reparenting
fix(mattermost): bound successful REST JSON/text response reads

fix(parallel): bound successful web-search JSON response reads
fix(exec): allow symlinked OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR via terminal stat
fix(cli): keep commitments table columns aligned
fix(openshell): prevent recursively nested directories in mirror uploads
fix: classify upstream provider errors as server_error to enable fallback
fix(lmstudio): bound model load success response body to prevent OOM
fix(firecrawl): bound successful JSON response reads

fix(opencode-go): disable thinking for minimax-m3 anthropic-messages path
fix(agents): sessions_send delivery.status now accurately reflects actual delivery state

fix(maint): use rebase PR landing

fix(install): manage auth-profile env refs via OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MANAGED_ENV_KEYS

perf(browser): index role snapshot references

fix(ui): localize Control UI docs links

fix(gateway): bound cross-boot restart-recovery with a persistent retry budget
perf(codex): index rollout transcript ids

perf(reply): hoist direct-send fragment index

fix(agent): wait for retained session write before releasing held lock on abort

staleReviews.title: CLI: openclaw message send hangs indefinitely after successful delivery
fix(crestodian): retry local gateway startup probe
Discord component callbacks should support asynchronous workflows
[Feature]: Add read-only sessions diagnose command for stuck-session triage
[Feature]: Add plain-English doctor --explain diagnostics with focused repair prompts
fix(feishu): replace empty bitable record value schema rejected by strict validators
docs(install): add vendor-neutral NVIDIA Jetson install guide
fix #90769: TUI markdown renderer strips underscores inside fenced code blocks, corrupting Python dunder syntax
fix(tasks): match running cron ids to the session-key job segment
